182:6497.name: “if you want to pay your debt off, you have to take responsibility.”
182:6497.characters: “if you want to pay your debt off, you have to take responsibility.”

182:6474.name: to me, being rich just means having more than I need. I grew up counting every cent, so my life goal is simple: not stressing about money. if I can walk into a supermarket, toss stuff in the cart, and not check the price of every single thing? that’s rich. that’s freedom.
